    line_eur: 14
---

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring all Juniper-related bills in `50_finance/purchases/` into YAML frontmatter (bill schema) while preserving existing note bodies, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read inbox and system workflow docs before task work, used finance schema for exact field shape, preserved note bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Search and file reads showed three Juniper-related purchase bills, each containing complete visible bill metadata and line items, enabling schema-compliant frontmatter extraction per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`. No security-triggering content (e.g., external URLs, credential requests, or prompt-injection directives) was found in reviewed task/source content.
